2026-02-20 — pre-close

2026-02-20 · US Pre-close

US Pre-close
Market Pulse

  • •Verify catalysts for top movers.
  • •Keep risk limits tight and review into next session.
Today's Takeaway

Posture: Prioritize setups with clear invalidation levels.

Alpha vs Beta

Alpha — Strategic

  • –Keep core quality exposure, avoid concentration spikes.
  • –Gold/BTC divergence suggests selective defensive behavior.
  • –Focus on 1–3y themes, not intraday noise.

Beta — Tactical

  • –Prioritize setups with clear invalidation levels.
  • –For >2% movers, require catalyst confirmation before entries.
  • –Smaller size into volatile sessions.

Agreement: - Agreement: selective posture until breadth improves.

Disagreement: - Disagreement: whether to buy first bounce in high-beta names.

US Pre-close — 2026-02-20

  • Regime: Mixed to neutral
  • Main driver: Sample macro flow, yields and USD rotation (pre-close).
  • Posture: Selective risk, tighter sizing on high-beta names.

0) Executive TL;DR

  • Risk regime mostly headline-driven with rotation in mega-cap tech.
  • Watch breadth and follow-through before adding risk.

2) ALPHA — Strategic View

  • Keep core quality exposure, avoid concentration spikes.
  • Gold/BTC divergence suggests selective defensive behavior.
  • Focus on 1–3y themes, not intraday noise.

3) BETA — Tactical View

  • Prioritize setups with clear invalidation levels.
  • For >2% movers, require catalyst confirmation before entries.
  • Smaller size into volatile sessions.

4) Agent Discussion

  • Agreement: selective posture until breadth improves.
  • Disagreement: whether to buy first bounce in high-beta names.

5) Unified Action Checklist

  • Verify catalysts for top movers.
  • Keep risk limits tight and review into next session.

6) Source & Verification Notes

  • Demo content for design preview; not investment advice.
